---
title: "Project Log"
subtitle: "Getting my Ducks in Row"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
listing:
  contents: project_log/*/index.qmd
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [title, subtitle, description]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
---

![](img/ducks_in_row.jpeg){fig-align="center" width="445"}

::: {style="text-align:center"}
Keeping my project working notes, decisions and process updates in a single place.
:::
